name: GREAT SOUTHERN BANCORP, INC.
summary: Great Southern Bancorp, Inc. is a Maryland-incorporated financial holding company and parent of Great Southern Bank, a Missouri-chartered commercial bank founded in 1923. Through 89 banking centers across Missouri, Kansas, Arkansas, Iowa, and Minnesota, the Bank offers retail and commercial banking services including commercial real estate loans, commercial business loans, construction loans, consumer loans, and deposit accounts. At December 31, 2025, consolidated total assets were $5.60 billion.

products.name: Commercial Real Estate Loans
products.description: Loans secured by commercial real estate properties offered through banking centers and loan production offices.

products.name: Commercial Business Loans
products.description: Business lending products offered through banking centers and commercial loan production offices.

products.name: Commercial Construction Loans
products.description: Construction financing for commercial projects offered through banking centers and loan production offices.

products.name: Consumer Loans
products.description: Direct consumer lending products offered through the banking center network.

products.name: Deposit Accounts
products.description: FDIC-insured deposit accounts offered through 89 banking centers across multiple states.

partnerships.description: Multiple purchase and assumption agreements for FDIC-assisted bank acquisitions in 2009, 2011, 2012, and 2014.
